message:
feat(core): add Mermaid.js config adapter, structured diagnostics, and init config extensions

Introduce `parse_mermaid_js_config_value()` to parse Mermaid.js-compatible
JSON config objects (theme, themeVariables, flowchart direction/curve,
sequence mirrorActors, securityLevel) into fm-core's MermaidConfig type.
This enables front-matter YAML and %%{init}%% directives to share a
single, well-tested config parsing path.

Add `to_init_parse()` projection to convert MermaidConfigParse into the
existing MermaidInitParse format for backward compatibility with the
parser pipeline.

Extend MermaidInitConfig with `flowchart_curve` and
`sequence_mirror_actors` fields to support additional Mermaid.js
configuration options.

Add MermaidWarningCode::as_str() for stable machine-readable warning codes.

Introduce StructuredDiagnostic -- a schema for automation-friendly
diagnostic payloads with error codes, severity ranking, source locations,
rule IDs, confidence scores, and remediation hints. Includes factory
methods from_diagnostic(), from_warning(), and from_error() plus builder
methods for enrichment.

Add comprehensive test coverage for config adapter mapping, type error
reporting, init parse projection, and structured diagnostic construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
